topStories.description: He complained of breathing difficulties earlier this afternoon at his Chandigarh residence. He was rushed to the hospital in Mohali, where he breathed his last.

dailyNews.description: The national counter-terrorism prosecution department has initiated a formal inquiry into the matter, French Interior Minister Laurent Nunez said

Peter Alexander signs off from NBC News after 20 years
dailyNews.description: Veteran journalist Peter Alexander has announced his exit from NBC News after more than two decades. The White House correspondent is reportedly expected to join MS NOW, marking a major shift in the US television news landscape.

Over 3100 events, 9 mn people expected: ‘No Kings’ protests against Donald Trump to be one of the largest in US history?
dailyNews.description: Protests against President Trump may reportedly become one of the largest in US history, with over 3,100 events planned nationwide. Organisers anticipate participation exceeding nine million people. The demonstrations began in Paris, where Americans and French groups held anti-Trump placards.

dailyNews.title: ‘Welcome to Hell’: Iranian daily warns US troops 'will leave only in coffins if...'
dailyNews.description: According to reports, the US is mulling a possible ground operation in Kharg Island – Iran's strategic oil hub – while Iranians have started laying mines and moved additional forces to the Island.

dailyNews.title: 'If you think you can do it better...': Marco Rubio, EU official had heated exchange over Russia at G7 meet, says report
dailyNews.description: During a discussion at the G7 meeting on Friday, United States Secretary of State Marco Rubio reportedly fired back at EU foreign policy chief Kaja Kallas over a question on Russia-Ukraine war.

dailyNews.title: Looksmaxxing influencer Clavicular arrested on battery charge in Florida
dailyNews.description: Peters is accused of instigating a fight between two women and then posting a video of it online, authorities say.

dailyNews.title: MEA denies Elon Musk joined Modi-Trump call regarding West Asia war, refutes New York Times report
dailyNews.description: India's MEA confirmed that Prime Minister Modi and US President Trump had a private call, refuting claims of Elon Musk's participation. They discussed the West Asia conflict and the importance of the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Indian government refutes report of Elon Musk joining Modi-Trump phone call
dailyNews.description: The government clarifies Elon Musk did not join the phone call between PM Modi and US President Trump on West Asia tensions.

dailyNews.title: US-Iran war: Kuwait International Airport hit by drone attacks, radar system severely damaged
dailyNews.description: Kuwait International Airport faced multiple drone attacks on Saturday, which damaged its radar system. No casualties occurred, but the incident follows a previous attack on 25 March. Shuwaikh Port also sustained damage from a drone strike, impacting the country's trade operations.

dailyNews.title: India rejects NYT report that Elon Musk joined key Modi-Trump call over war
dailyNews.description: Elon Musk joined the phone call between Prime Minister Modi and US President Donald Trump that took place on Tuesday over West Asia conflict.

dailyNews.title: 'Epstein Island' replaces White House name on Android, Google blames fake Maps edit
dailyNews.description: A technical glitch caused the White House switchboard number to appear as 'Epstein Island' on some Android devices. Google confirmed the glitch and said it was due to a fake edit on Google Maps.

dailyNews.title: ‘Suspend flights in high-risk conflict zones’ in West Asia': Pilots' body writes to DGCA, seeks war risk insurance cover
dailyNews.description: Iran-US war: The pilot's association mentioned in its letter to the DGCA that “the current belligerents, USA, Israel and Iran have shot down civilian airlines in the fog of war of previous conflicts.”

dailyNews.title: Puducherry Congress leader AV Subramanian resigns from all party positions ahead of assembly polls
dailyNews.description: Subramanian cited ‘private reasons and unavoidable circumstances’ as reasons for the decision in a letter to V Vaithilingam, Puducherry Congress chief.

dailyNews.title: Wild Ultimatums and ‘Bombing Our Little Hearts Out’: A Portrait of Trump at War
dailyNews.description: President Trump has vacillated between boasting about U.S. military superiority and deep frustration that his war of choice is not always having the desired effects.

dailyNews.title: In an Asymmetrical War, Iran Seeks an Edge With Its Information War
dailyNews.description: Propaganda and disinformation have flooded the internet in a sophisticated effort to undermine support for U.S. and Israeli attacks.

dailyNews.title: House Vote Sets Up Clash With the Senate on D.H.S. Funding, Prolonging Shutdown
dailyNews.description: Republicans revolted over a Senate measure to fund the Department of Homeland Security and passed a rival bill, dimming the chances of a quick end to the crisis crippling airports.

dailyNews.description: Organizers want this to be largest protest yet. But is hitting a number enough to deliver an effective political movement?

dailyNews.description: The Conservative Political Action Conference typically seeks to establish orthodoxy with its roster of speakers. This year, organizers created space for dissent, highlighting ongoing schisms in the MAGA movement.

dailyNews.title: Trump Does Anything He Wants — and More
dailyNews.description: When you’re a wannabe king they let you do it.

dailyNews.description: The Trump administration is awaiting Iran's formal response to its 15-point peace proposal, as Tehran continues blocking the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.description: Organizers say more than 3,100 events have been registered in the U.S., with more than 9 million people expected to participate.

dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump is used to bending financial markets to his will

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.

dailyNews.title: Canada Is Becoming a Fentanyl Exporter, and a Target for Trump
dailyNews.description: The drug is increasingly manufactured in and trafficked from the U.S.’s northern neighbor, though the numbers remain small compared with Mexico.
